chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No.D-399 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For hearing of CMA No.1532/22. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.05.2022 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Kanasiro Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan AAG. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar DPG for State. *************** Mr. Jai Kumar Lund Advocate files Vakalatnama alongwith counter-affidavit together with certain documents on behalf of respondent No.6, while Official respondent Nos.2,4 and 5 file their respective comments; which are taken on record. In response to notice, Investigating Officer of Crime No.42/2022 of Police Station, Kandhra district Sukkur is present. He submits the copy of statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Aikta Kumari recorded u/s 161 Cr.P.C wherein she has stated that neither she was abducted by anyone nor she is under wrongful confinement but she has contracted marriage with her own free will with petitioner No.2 Kamlesh Kumar without any coercion and compulsion. She has further stated that her maternal uncle, the respondent No.6 has lodged a false FIR against her husband and others. The I.O. states that he would submit a report under Section 173, Cr.P.C before the concerned Judicial Magistrate in the light of statement of petitioner No.1 for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied with the statement of the I.O. seeks disposal of this petition by directing SSP Sukkur to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Ihsan/PS
